title: Inference Platform Economics — Fireworks, Together, Baseten, Modal, Replicate, Anyscale

questions.question: Which three market segments does the lesson use to organize 2026 inference vendors?
questions.question_zh: 课程把 2026 年的推理供应商分成哪三个细分市场？
options: Custom silicon, GPU platforms, API-first marketplaces
options_zh: 定制芯片、GPU 平台、API 优先的市场

questions.question: Around what sustained GPU utilization does per-minute billing (Baseten, Modal) start to beat per-token billing (Fireworks, Together)?
questions.question_zh: GPU 持续利用率大约到多少时，按分钟计费（Baseten、Modal）开始优于按 token 计费（Fireworks、Together）？

questions.question: Which platform is described as Python-native serverless with per-second billing and 2-4s cold starts after pre-warming?
questions.question_zh: 哪个平台被描述为 Python 原生 serverless、按秒计费，预热之后冷启动 2-4 秒？

questions.question: What is Fireworks's notable LoRA pricing differentiator?
questions.question_zh: Fireworks 在 LoRA 定价上有什么显著差异？
options: LoRA-served requests cost more than base model
LoRA is not supported at all
LoRA requests require a separate dedicated GPU contract
LoRA-served requests are charged at the base model's per-token rate
options_zh: LoRA 服务的请求比基模型更贵
LoRA 请求需要单独签独占 GPU 合同
LoRA 服务的请求按基模型的 per-token 价格计费

questions.question: Which platform fits a regulated healthcare customer that needs SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA-ready posture, and dedicated GPUs?
questions.question_zh: 对于需要 SOC 2 Type II、HIPAA 合规姿态以及独占 GPU 的受监管医疗客户，哪个平台最合适？

questions.question: Why does the lesson argue that custom-engine claims are mostly marketing shade at the platform layer?
questions.question_zh: 为什么课程认为「自研推理引擎」的宣传在平台层基本属于营销噪音？
options: Per-token pricing is the only real differentiator
vLLM and SGLang represent roughly 80% of production open-source inference, so platform differentiation comes more from DX, attribution, and SLAs than engine
All custom engines are forks of TensorRT-LLM
options_zh: 按 token 定价是唯一真正的差异化
vLLM 和 SGLang 占了生产开源推理的约 80%，平台之间的差异更多来自开发体验、归因和 SLA，而不是引擎本身
所有自研引擎都是 TensorRT-LLM 的分支
自研引擎从来没赢过 vLLM
